entries.definition:
كتاب الواو

وعد - وعر

(وفي) الواو والفاء والحرف المعتلّ: كلمةٌ تدلُّ على إكمالٍ وإتمام. منه الوَفاء: إتمام العَهْد وإكمال الشَّرط. ووَفَى: أوْفَى، فهو وفِيٌّ. ويقولون: أوْفَيْتُكَ الشَّيءَ، إذا قَضَيْتَه إيّاهُ وافياً. وتوفَّيْتُ الشَّيءَ واستَوْفَيْته؛ [إذا أخذتَه كُلّه ] حتَّى لم تتركْ منه شيئاً. ومنه يقال للميِّت: تَوفَّاه الله.

w–f–y death; goal; loyalty, fidelity, faithfulness; to show up;
to carry out a promise; (of debts) to pay back in full, to give full
measure, to complete; to come at an appointed time, to be
recalled; to increase. Of this root, 10 forms occur 66 times in the
Qur’an: وَفَّى waffā nine times; وُفِّيَ wuffiya nine times; أَوْفَى (1)
ʾawfā 18 times; تَوَفَّى tawaffā 20 times; يُتَوَفَّى yutawaffā four times;
يَسْتَوْفِي yastawfī once; أَوْفَى (2) ʾawfā twice; مُوفُون mūfūn once; مُوَفُّون
muwaffūn once and مُتَوَفِّي mutawaffī once.

1037
entries.definition_english:
w–f–y death; goal; loyalty, fidelity, faithfulness; to show up;
to carry out a promise; (of debts) to pay back in full, to give full
measure, to complete; to come at an appointed time, to be
recalled; to increase. Of this root, 10 forms occur 66 times in the
Qur’an: وَفَّى waffā nine times; وُفِّيَ wuffiya nine times; أَوْفَى (1)
ʾawfā 18 times; تَوَفَّى tawaffā 20 times; يُتَوَفَّى yutawaffā four times;
يَسْتَوْفِي yastawfī once; أَوْفَى (2) ʾawfā twice; مُوفُون mūfūn once; مُوَفُّون
muwaffūn once and مُتَوَفِّي mutawaffī once.

1037

entries.definition:
وَفَّى waffā [v. II] 1 [trans.] to fulfil a promise, to complete an
assignment (53:36) وَإِبْرَاهِيمَ الَّذِي وَفَّى and Abraham who fulfilled his
duty 2 [doubly trans.] to pay someone his dues in full
(35:30) لِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ أُجُورَهُمْ that He may pay them their rewards in full.

وُفِّيَ wuffiya [pass. v.] to be paid one’s dues in full (16:111)
وَتُوَفَّى كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَا عَمِلَتْ every soul will be paid in full for what it has
done.

أَوْفَى (1) ʾawfā [v. IV] 1 [intrans. with prep. بِـ] to honour (an
agreement), to fulfil (a promise) (2:40) وَأَوْفُوا بِعَهْدِي أُوفِ بِعَهْدِكُمْ
honour your pledge to Me and I will honour My pledge to you 2
[trans.] to give a full measure (17:35) وَأَوْفُوا الْكَيْلَ إِذَا كِلْتُمْ and fill up
the measure when you measure.

تَوَفَّى tawaffā [v. V, trans.] 1 (of God) to recall (a person or
soul), to bring to the end of the allotted lifespan (16:70) وَاللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ
ثُمَّ يَتَوَفَّاكُمْ God has created you and will [surely] recall you 2 (of
death) to claim a soul (4:15) فَأَمْسِكُوهُنَّ فِي الْبُيُوتِ حَتَّى يَتَوَفَّاهُنَّ الْمَوْتُ so
detain them at home until death claims them 3 (of the angels or
Angel of Death) to bring back, to reap, to harvest (6:61) حَتَّى إِذَا جَاءَ
أَحَدَكُمُ الْمَوْتُ تَوَفَّتْهُ رُسُلُنَا until, when death visits/approaches any of
you, Our envoys claim him.

يُتَوَفَّى yutawaffā [pass. v. V] to be recalled, to be taken back, to
die (22:5) وَمِنْكُمْ مَنْ يُتَوَفَّى and some from among you die.

يَسْتَوْفِي yastawfī (v. X, trans.) to exact to the full, to demand
one’s dues in full (83:2) الَّذِينَ إِذَا اكْتَالُوا عَلَى النَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ those who,
when they take measure from people, demand it in full.

أَوْفَى (2) ʾawfā [elat.] 1 fuller/fullest (53:41) ثُمَّ يُجْزَاهُ الْجَزَاءَ الْأَوْفَى
then he will be repaid in the fullest measure for it 2 more faithful
to a promise, more fulfilling of an agreement (9:111) وَمَنْ أَوْفَى بِعَهْدِهِ
مِنَ اللَّهِ who could be more fulfilling of (or, more faithful to) his
promise than God?

مُوَفُّون muwaffūn [pl. of act. part. مُوَفٍّ muwaffī] those who pay
(dues) in full (11:109) وَإِنَّا لَمُوَفُّوهُمْ نَصِيبَهُمْ غَيْرَ مَنْقُوصٍ and We shall
certainly give them their share undiminished.

مُوفُون mūfūn [pl. of act. part. مُوفٍ mūfī] those who keep an

1038
